Package egovframework.let.uss.sam.stp.service.impl

Class EgovStplatManageServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.uss.sam.stp.service.impl.EgovStplatManageServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovStplatManageService
@Service("StplatManageService") public class EgovStplatManageServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovStplatManageService
약관내용을 처리하는 서비스 구현 클래스
Since:
2009.04.01
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통서비스 개발팀 박정규
